# Rahul Sahani — Portfolio

> Full-stack developer and creative engineer specializing in Next.js, React, TypeScript, Three.js, and Tailwind CSS.

## About
Rahul Sahani is a passionate full-stack developer from India who builds immersive, high-performance web applications. His work spans frontend engineering, creative 3D development, and full-stack architecture. He brings designs to life with Framer Motion animations, builds real-time 3D visualizations with Three.js and React Three Fiber, and architects serverless backends.

## Pages
- / — Homepage with interactive 3D hero section featuring a spaceship and black hole
- /about — About page with skills, experience, and personal story
- /projects — Project showcase with case studies and interactive previews
- /contact — Contact form (powered by Resend) and social links
- /guestbook — Public guestbook with community messages
- /gaming — Gaming section with interactive content and game videos
- /blog — Technical blog posts written in MDX

## Tech Stack
- Framework: Next.js 14 (App Router)
- Language: TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- 3D: Three.js, React Three Fiber, React Three Drei
- Animation: Framer Motion
- CMS: ContentLayer (MDX)
- Database: Upstash Redis
- Email: Resend
- Hosting: Vercel
- Analytics: Google Analytics

## Social
- GitHub: https://github.com/Rahul-Sahani04
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/rahulsahani04
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/me_rsahani
- Website: https://www.rsahani.space
